# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.0.x   | ✅ Yes     |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue, please report it responsibly:

**Email:** kashsightplatform@gmail.com

**Include:**
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Your suggested fix (if any)

**Do NOT:**
- Open a public issue for security vulnerabilities
- Share exploit details publicly

We will respond within 48 hours and work to resolve the issue.

## Content Security

- Content packages are distributed as encrypted `.ksl` files
- Digital signatures verify content integrity
- User settings are stored locally, never transmitted

## Third-Party Dependencies

- `click` — CLI framework (PyPI)
- `rich` — Terminal UI (PyPI)

Both are well-maintained, widely used packages.
